title: Natural Firefly Bushes
description: Yellower firefly particles and desynced firefly bush animations for a more natural look, plus an animated firefly bush item texture
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1u7lYbpD/images/889a49ee6b379913275179603279c539b2fa2be1.png)
A minor issue with firefly bushes is that that all of their animations are synced together, making their animation follow an unnatural pattern when many are placed in close proximity. This resource pack aims to fix this by making the animation on every firefly bush start at a different frame, removing the predictable pattern and giving it a more natural feel. It also makes the firefly bush item in your inventory animated and makes the firefly particles more yellow to look more like actual fireflies.
Unsynced firefly bush animations and yellow firefly particles are changes that were proposed by BdoubleO100 here and here respectively, so I decided to make it a reality because Bdubs' opinion is always right. Unfortunately there's no way to make textures change based on time of day, so I can't make the texture not twinkle during the day.
_There's since been a similar feature added to the [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) resource pack in the Variation section, though with randomized offsets (like grass or flowers) and without the yellower fireflies or an animated item texture. This makes this pack a bit redundant, so it might be reworked in the future if I ever find an interesting idea on how to make it unique._
